scenes.narration: Merit letters go out soon. You still haven't checked who's below minimum — or whether a manager earns less than their team. ShiftWorks HR ends that weekly fire drill.
Just export from Workday or your payroll system and drop the file in. We map your columns automatically. No setup project. No IT ticket.
About a minute later, you know exactly what has to be fixed before you lock the cycle. Critical flags, dollar gaps, and merit pool math your CFO will ask about.
This is what leadership asks about. Every person below minimum — name, department, dollar gap — plus manager inversions sitting right next to them.
Need to brief leadership? One export gives you a PDF with risk level, budget exposure, and the findings they'll actually ask about.
Try it with your own roster at shiftworkshr.com. Free to start — no credit card.
